name: Paramark
description: Marketing measurement platform combining incrementality testing, MMM and growth advisory in a structured framework.

seo.title: Paramark — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Paramark: Marketing measurement platform combining incrementality testing, MMM and growth advisory in a structured framework.

when_to_use: Measuring incremental lift from paid media with MMM
Combining incrementality tests with marketing mix models
Allocating budget across channels with causal attribution

pros: Structured framework across incrementality, MMM and advisory
Human advisory layer, not just software
Good fit for marketing leaders, not just analysts
cons: Services-heavy, so price scales with that
Young company with limited public case studies
Not an MMP — pairs with tracking tools
Cadence slower than pure software MTA
review.verdict: Thoughtful measurement plus advisory for leaders who want rigor, but less relevant for day-to-day UA ops.
review.best_for: CMO and growth leads wanting a rigorous measurement framework with human guidance.
review.not_for: Hands-on mobile UA teams that just need an MMP and fraud tool.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
